name: Hangover Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage and bacon in a Dutch oven until the sausage is brown and the bacon is crisp. Remove and drain the sausage and bacon, reserving the drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon.
3. In the reserved drippings, cook the onion and green pepper until tender but not brown.
4. Drain off any excess fat.
5. Stir in the cooked sausage and bacon, beef broth, sauerkraut, mushrooms, celery, tomatoes, paprika, and caraway seed.
6. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat.
7. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes.
8. Meanwhile, combine sour cream and flour in a separate bowl.
9. Gradually stir about 1 cup of the hot soup into the sour cream mixture.
10. Return all ingredients to the Dutch oven.
11. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Continue cooking and stirring for an additional minute.
12. Makes 6 servings.
